member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Adjust Control Set Value message (command ID 73)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.PackageDutIndex
member.summary: The package-level DUT index (does not correlate to different IPs for intraDUT)

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.CsIndex
member.summary: The control set index

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.Action
member.summary: The action

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.ValueId
member.summary: The field in the control set to adjust

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.Value
member.summary: The new value or amount to adjust existing value

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.AdjustControlSetValueMessage.ZoneIndex
member.summary: The zone index

member.summary: The offset at which the data was read

member.summary: The region that was read

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.BulkReadReplyMessage.Data

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.BulkReadRequestMessage.NumBytes

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.ClearDutFaultBitsMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Clear Dut Fault Bits message (command ID 63)

member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.ClearDutFaultBitsMessage.DutMask
member.summary: Mask of DUTs to clear

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationOkReplyMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Communication OK Reply message (command ID 1)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationOkReplyMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationProtocolErrorReplyMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Communication Protocol Error Reply message (command ID 2)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationProtocolErrorReplyMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationProtocolErrorReplyMessage.ErrorId
member.summary:
The error ID:
0 – This ID is currently unused/reserved for future use
1 - Unrecognized command ID
2 - Invalid payload length
3 - Invalid payload data
4-99 - Reserved for future use for generic errors. Owned by HDMT.
100+ - Available for client-specific errors.

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.CommunicationProtocolErrorReplyMessage.Message
member.summary: The optional error message

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.DebugUnrecognizedCommandMessage

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.DebugUnrecognizedCommandMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.summary: Client is currently executing the bootloader

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.NoPayloadMessageBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for command messages with no payload

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendFlowItemNameMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Send FlowItem Name message (command ID 72)
member.remarks: This command was previously described as the "Send Test Instance Name" command, despite actually sending the FlowItem name

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendFlowItemNameMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendFlowItemNameMessage.DutIndex
member.summary:
Unique DUT index. For defined DUTs indexing begins at 0.
Example:
1. MDUTx2 DUTs[11,12]
Dut1112
Index01
2. INTRADUT MDUTx2 Package DUTs[11, 12] each including IP DUTs[IPA, IPB]
Dut1111_IPA11_IPB1212_IPA12_IPB
Index012345

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendFlowItemNameMessage.FlowItemName
member.summary: The FlowItem name

member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.summary: The possible RCTC types sent to the client

member.summary: Unknown type

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendHostInfoMessage.RctcTypes.Rctc2
member.summary: RCTC2

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendHostInfoMessage.RctcTypes.Rctc3
member.summary: RCTC3

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendHostInfoMessage.RctcTypes.HbiRctc
member.summary: HBI RCTC

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendHostInfoMessage.RctcTypes.Gen3BpRc
member.summary: Gen3 BP RC

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SendHostInfoMessage.RctcType
member.summary: The RCTC type

member.summary: The TOS generation

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SetActiveControlSetMessage.DelayMs

member.summary: Concrete class for the Software Version Reply message (command ID 8)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionReplyMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionReplyMessage.Version
member.summary: The version information. Only and may be populated, depending on how how the UEI client FW replied. Newer UEI clients may also return and . maps to version_patch and maps to version_build in the UEI reply, per the UEI spec

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionReplyMessage.SubsystemIndex
member.summary: The subsystem index.

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionRequestMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Software Version Request message (command ID 7)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionRequestMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.SoftwareVersionRequestMessage.SubsystemIndex
member.summary: The subsystem index. Must correspond to those used with the bulk read/write commands.

member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.summary: The unique packet index

member.summary: The value IDs for the packet

member.summary: Concrete class for the Streaming Value Ids From Target Request message (command ID 67)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsFromTargetRequestMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsFromTargetRequestMessage.UniquePacketIndex
member.summary: The unique packet index

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsToTargetMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Streaming ValueIds To Target message (command ID 66)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsToTargetMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsToTargetMessage.UniquePacketIndex
member.summary: The unique packet index

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValueIdsToTargetMessage.StreamingValueIdsToTarget
member.summary: The value IDs for the packet. Static values are represented as 0, which maps to .

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoReplyMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Streaming Values Info Reply message (command ID 46)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoReplyMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoReplyMessage.NumValuesPerPacket
member.summary: The number of streaming values that will be streamed from the client

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoReplyMessage.NumUniquePacketIds
member.summary: The number of unique packet IDs that will be streamed from the client

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoReplyMessage.StreamingIds
member.summary: Client-specific value IDs describing the streamable values in each packet

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoRequestMessage
member.summary: Concrete class for the Streaming Values Info Request message (command ID 45)

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoRequestMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoRequestMessage.NumValuesPerPacket
member.summary: The number of streaming values that will be streamed to the client

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.StreamingValuesInfoRequestMessage.NumUniquePacketIds
member.summary: The number of unique packet IDs that will be streamed to the client

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.TargetIdRequestMessage.CommandId

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase
member.summary: Base class for a UEI command message

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.TimestampUs
member.summary: Gets the timestamp of the command. Will only be populated for reply messages or cached messages

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.FromNetworkOrder(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets an unsigned 16-bit integer with host endianness from an input that is in network byte order (big-endian)
member.param: The original value in network byte order
member.returns: The value in host byte order

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.FromNetworkOrder(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets an unsigned 32-bit integer with host endianness from an input that is in network byte order (big-endian)
member.param: The original value in network byte order
member.returns: The value in host byte order

member.summary: Gets an unsigned 64-bit integer with host endianness from an input that is in network byte order (big-endian)
member.param: The original value in network byte order
member.returns: The value in host byte order

member.param: The original value in network byte order
member.returns: The value in host byte order

member.param: The original value in host byte order
member.returns: The value in network byte order

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetUInt16(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an unsigned 16-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetUInt32(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an unsigned 32-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetUInt64(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an unsigned 64-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetInt16(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a signed 16-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetInt32(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a signed 32-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetInt64(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a signed 64-bit integer from the specified byte array at the specified index. Assumes network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.SetUInt16(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Set an unsigned 16-bit integer to the specified byte array at the specified index in network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index
member.param: The unsigned 16-bit value to set (with host endianness)

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.SetUInt32(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set an unsigned 32-bit integer to the specified byte array at the specified index in network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index
member.param: The unsigned 32-bit value to set (with host endianness)

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.SetUInt64(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt64)

member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index
member.param: The unsigned 64-bit value to set (with host endianness)

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.SetInt16(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int16)
member.summary: Set a signed 16-bit integer to the specified byte array at the specified index in network byte order (big-endian).
member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index
member.param: The signed 16-bit value to set (with host endianness)

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.SetInt32(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)

member.remarks: Assumes index is valid and there are sufficient bytes at the index
member.param: The signed 64-bit value to set (with host endianness)

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiCommandMessageBase.GetAsciiString(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get an ASCII string from the specified byte array at the specified index, using bytes until the end of the array or (optionally) a null byte is encountered.
member.param: True to terminate the string if a null byte is encountered

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiStructCommandMessage`1
member.summary: Base class for a command message that gets/sets its payload using a struct

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiStructCommandMessage`1.StructHasNoFields
member.summary: A flag indicating if the struct type has no fields and should be serialized/deserialized to an empty array

member.name: F:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiStructCommandMessage`1.Struct
member.summary: The instance of used to serialize/deserialize the data

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiStructTransmitCommandMessage`1
member.summary: Base class for a transmit command message that gets/sets its payload using a struct

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UeiStructTransmitCommandMessage`1.CommandId
member.summary: The command ID for this command

member.name: T:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UnknownCommandMessage
member.summary: Class that is returned when an unknown command ID or invalid payload data is encountered for a reply message or when accessing cached messages

member.name: M:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UnknownCommandMessage.#ctor(System.Byte)
member.summary: Constructed a new instance with the specified command ID

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UnknownCommandMessage.CommandId
member.summary: The ID of the invalid command

member.name: P:HdmtOs.Sdk.Uei.CommandMessages.UnknownCommandMessage.Payload
member.summary: The raw payload data
